arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Norwich City v Millwall
arts.sum: Follow live updates and join the debate at the Stadium of Light via our live matchday blog above with chief Norwich City reporter Connor Southwell

Jose Cordoba's red card left Norwich with a lot of work to do with the score tied at 1-1 against Sunderland, and the Canaries went on to concede just two minutes later en route to a 2-1 away defeat. ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Norwich City vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Championship clash between Norwich City and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
